node.html: Interactive knowledge assistant powered by LLM retrieval augmentation, embedding search, and dynamic prompt chaining for enterprise Q&A over internal documentation and policy archives.

Automated AI orchestration platform that integrates model inference, data transformation, and quality checks across ETL pipelines, delivering scheduled insights and alerts with minimal manual intervention.

AI-powered lease abstraction platform for life sciences REITs. Combines OCR, LLM extraction, and metadata mapping with Azure Blob/Cosmos DB storage, multi-tenant isolation, and streaming uploads for commercial lease review.
Multimodal search system combining text, audio, and OCR-extracted content into a single semantic index for rapid search and analysis across documents, recordings, and scanned reports.

frontmatter.title: Document Chatbot with Azure AI Search

node.html: Retrieval-based document Q&A system that indexes Blob Storage documents in Azure AI Search, enabling natural language queries over unstructured content with RAG-style retrieval.
Conversational voice assistant prototype using Whisper for speech-to-text and GPT-4 for natural language response generation, with prompt templates tuned for quality and latency.
This project was developed as part of Google's #30DaysOfKotlin program
